message:
fix(ci): use --extra instead of --group for optional dependencies

The CI workflow was using `uv sync --frozen --group dev` but the project
defines `dev` and `test` as optional-dependencies, not dependency-groups.
The --group flag is for PEP 735 dependency groups defined under
[dependency-groups], while --extra is for [project.optional-dependencies].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ jobs:
         run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: uv sync --frozen --group dev
+        run: uv sync --frozen --extra dev
 
       - name: Run ruff linter
         run: uv run ruff check .
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ jobs:
         run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: uv sync --frozen --group dev
+        run: uv sync --frozen --extra dev
 
       - name: Run mypy
         run: uv run mypy . --ignore-missing-imports
@@ -80,7 +80,7 @@ jobs:
         run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: uv sync --frozen --group dev --group test
+        run: uv sync --frozen --extra dev --extra test
 
       - name: Run tests with pytest
         run: |
